segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why is Tim finding this trip exciting?

translations.zh-Hans: 为什么蒂姆觉得这次旅行令人兴奋？

segments.text: I have just received a letter from my brother, Tim.

translations.zh-Hans: 我刚刚收到弟弟蒂姆的一封信。

segments.text: He has been there for six months.

translations.zh-Hans: 他在那里已经待了六个月。

segments.text: He is working for a big firm and he has already visited a great number of different places in Australia.

translations.zh-Hans: 他在一家大公司工作，并且已经去过澳大利亚许多不同的地方。

segments.text: He has just bought an Australian car and has gone to Alice Springs, a small town in the center of Australia.

translations.zh-Hans: 他刚买了一辆澳大利亚汽车，现在已经去了澳大利亚中部的小镇艾丽斯斯普林斯。
他不久还将到达尔文去。

segments.text: From there, he will fly to Perth.
My brother has never been abroad before, so he is finding this trip very exciting.

translations.zh-Hans: 我弟弟以前从未出过国，因此他觉得这次旅行非常令人兴奋。
